1/*
2 MPFR C++: Multi-precision floating point number class for C++.
3 Based on MPFR library: http://mpfr.org
4
5 Project homepage: http://www.holoborodko.com/pavel/mpfr
6 Contact e-mail: pavel@holoborodko.com
7
8 Copyright (c) 2008-2022 Pavel Holoborodko
9
10 Contributors:
11 Dmitriy Gubanov, Konstantin Holoborodko, Brian Gladman,
12 Helmut Jarausch, Fokko Beekhof, Ulrich Mutze, Heinz van Saanen,
13 Pere Constans, Peter van Hoof, Gael Guennebaud, Tsai Chia Cheng,
14 Alexei Zubanov, Jauhien Piatlicki, Victor Berger, John Westwood,
15 Petr Aleksandrov, Orion Poplawski, Charles Karney, Arash Partow,
16 Rodney James, Jorge Leitao, Jerome Benoit, Michal Maly.
17
18 Licensing:
19 (A) MPFR C++ is under GNU General Public License ("GPL").
20
21 (B) Non-free licenses may also be purchased from the author, for users who
22 do not want their programs protected by the GPL.
23
24 The non-free licenses are for users that wish to use MPFR C++ in
25 their products but are unwilling to release their software
26 under the GPL (which would require them to release source code
27 and allow free redistribution).
28
29 Such users can purchase an unlimited-use license from the author.
30 Contact us for more details.
31
32 GNU General Public License ("GPL") copyright permissions statement:
33 **************************************************************************
34 This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
35 it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
36 the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or
37 (at your option) any later version.
38
39 This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,

42 GNU General Public License for more details.

45 along with this program. If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.

48#ifndef __MPREAL_H__
49#define __MPREAL_H__
50
73
74#include <string>
75#include <iostream>
76#include <sstream>
77#include <stdexcept>
78#include <cfloat>
79#include <cmath>
80#include <cstring>
81#include <limits>
82#include <complex>
83#include <algorithm>
84#include <stdint.h>
85
86// Options
87#define MPREAL_HAVE_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW // Enable Debugger Visualizer for "Debug" builds in MSVC.
88#define MPREAL_HAVE_DYNAMIC_STD_NUMERIC_LIMITS // Enable extended std::numeric_limits<mpfr::mpreal> specialization.
89 // Meaning that "digits", "round_style" and similar members are defined as functions, not constants.
90 // See std::numeric_limits<mpfr::mpreal> at the end of the file for more information.
91
92// Library version
93#define MPREAL_VERSION_MAJOR 3
94#define MPREAL_VERSION_MINOR 6
95#define MPREAL_VERSION_PATCHLEVEL 9
96#define MPREAL_VERSION_STRING "3.6.9"
97
98// Detect compiler using signatures from http://predef.sourceforge.net/
99#if defined(__GNUC__) && defined(__INTEL_COMPILER)
100 #define IsInf(x) isinf(x) // Intel ICC compiler on Linux
101
102#elif defined(_MSC_VER) // Microsoft Visual C++
103 #define IsInf(x) (!_finite(x))
104
105#else
106 #define IsInf(x) std::isinf(x) // GNU C/C++ (and/or other compilers), just hope for C99 conformance
107#endif
108
109// A Clang feature extension to determine compiler features.
110#ifndef __has_feature
111 #define __has_feature(x) 0
112#endif
113
114// Detect support for r-value references (move semantic).
115// Move semantic should be enabled with great care in multi-threading environments,
116// especially if MPFR uses custom memory allocators.
117// Everything should be thread-safe and support passing ownership over thread boundary.
118#if (__has_feature(cxx_rvalue_references) || \
119 defined(__GXX_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX0X__) || __cplusplus >= 201103L || \
120 (defined(_MSC_VER) && _MSC_VER >= 1600) && !defined(MPREAL_DISABLE_MOVE_SEMANTIC))
121
122 #define MPREAL_HAVE_MOVE_SUPPORT
123
124 // Use fields in mpfr_t structure to check if it was initialized / set dummy initialization
125 #define mpfr_is_initialized(x) (0 != (x)->_mpfr_d)
126 #define mpfr_set_uninitialized(x) ((x)->_mpfr_d = 0 )
127#endif
128
129// Detect support for explicit converters.
130#if (__has_feature(cxx_explicit_conversions) || \
131 (defined(__GXX_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX0X__) && __GNUC_MINOR >= 5) || __cplusplus >= 201103L || \
132 (defined(_MSC_VER) && _MSC_VER >= 1800) || \
133 (defined(__INTEL_COMPILER) && __INTEL_COMPILER >= 1300))
134
135 #define MPREAL_HAVE_EXPLICIT_CONVERTERS
136#endif
137
138#define MPFR_USE_INTMAX_T // Enable 64-bit integer types - should be defined before mpfr.h
139
140#if defined(MPREAL_HAVE_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW) && defined(_MSC_VER) && defined(_DEBUG)
141 #define MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE DebugView = toString();
142 #define MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_DATA std::string DebugView;
143#else
144 #define MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE
145 #define MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_DATA
146#endif
147
148#define MPFR_USE_NO_MACRO
149#include <mpfr.h>
150
151#if (MPFR_VERSION < MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
152 #include <cstdlib> // Needed for random()
153#endif
154
155// Less important options
156#define MPREAL_DOUBLE_BITS_OVERFLOW -1 // Triggers overflow exception during conversion to double if mpreal
157 // cannot fit in MPREAL_DOUBLE_BITS_OVERFLOW bits
158 // = -1 disables overflow checks (default)
159
160// Fast replacement for mpfr_set_zero(x, +1):
161// (a) uses low-level data members, might not be forward compatible
162// (b) sign is not set, add (x)->_mpfr_sign = 1;
163#define mpfr_set_zero_fast(x) ((x)->_mpfr_exp = __MPFR_EXP_ZERO)
164
165#if defined(__GNUC__)
166 #define MPREAL_PERMISSIVE_EXPR __extension__
167#else
168 #define MPREAL_PERMISSIVE_EXPR
169#endif
170
171namespace mpfr {
172
173class mpreal {
174private:
175 mpfr_t mp;
176
177public:
178
179 // Get default rounding mode & precision
180 inline static mp_rnd_t get_default_rnd() { return (mp_rnd_t)(mpfr_get_default_rounding_mode()); }
181 inline static mp_prec_t get_default_prec() { return (mpfr_get_default_prec)(); }
182
183 // Constructors && type conversions
184 mpreal();
185 mpreal(const mpreal& u);
186 mpreal(const mpf_t u);
187 mpreal(const mpz_t u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
188 mpreal(const mpq_t u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
189 mpreal(const double u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
190 mpreal(const long double u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
191 mpreal(const unsigned long long int u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
192 mpreal(const long long int u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
193 mpreal(const unsigned long int u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
194 mpreal(const unsigned int u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
195 mpreal(const long int u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
196 mpreal(const int u, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
197
198 // Construct mpreal from mpfr_t structure.
199 // shared = true allows to avoid deep copy, so that mpreal and 'u' share the same data & pointers.
200 mpreal(const mpfr_t u, bool shared = false);
201
202 mpreal(const char* s, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), int base = 10, mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
203 mpreal(const std::string& s, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), int base = 10, mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
204
205 ~mpreal();
206
207#ifdef MPREAL_HAVE_MOVE_SUPPORT
208 mpreal& operator=(mpreal&& v);
209 mpreal(mpreal&& u);
210#endif
211
212 // Operations
213 // =
214 // +, -, *, /, ++, --, <<, >>
215 // *=, +=, -=, /=,
216 // <, >, ==, <=, >=
217
218 // =
219 mpreal& operator=(const mpreal& v);
220 mpreal& operator=(const mpf_t v);
221 mpreal& operator=(const mpz_t v);
222 mpreal& operator=(const mpq_t v);
223 mpreal& operator=(const long double v);
224 mpreal& operator=(const double v);
225 mpreal& operator=(const unsigned long int v);
226 mpreal& operator=(const unsigned long long int v);
227 mpreal& operator=(const long long int v);
228 mpreal& operator=(const unsigned int v);
229 mpreal& operator=(const long int v);
230 mpreal& operator=(const int v);
231 mpreal& operator=(const char* s);
232 mpreal& operator=(const std::string& s);
233 template <typename real_t> mpreal& operator= (const std::complex<real_t>& z);
234
235 // +
236 mpreal& operator+=(const mpreal& v);
237 mpreal& operator+=(const mpf_t v);
238 mpreal& operator+=(const mpz_t v);
239 mpreal& operator+=(const mpq_t v);
240 mpreal& operator+=(const long double u);
241 mpreal& operator+=(const double u);
242 mpreal& operator+=(const unsigned long int u);
243 mpreal& operator+=(const unsigned int u);
244 mpreal& operator+=(const long int u);
245 mpreal& operator+=(const int u);
246
247 mpreal& operator+=(const long long int u);
248 mpreal& operator+=(const unsigned long long int u);
249 mpreal& operator-=(const long long int u);
250 mpreal& operator-=(const unsigned long long int u);
251 mpreal& operator*=(const long long int u);
252 mpreal& operator*=(const unsigned long long int u);
253 mpreal& operator/=(const long long int u);
254 mpreal& operator/=(const unsigned long long int u);
255
256 const mpreal operator+() const;
257 mpreal& operator++ ();
258 const mpreal operator++ (int);
259
260 // -
261 mpreal& operator-=(const mpreal& v);
262 mpreal& operator-=(const mpz_t v);
263 mpreal& operator-=(const mpq_t v);
264 mpreal& operator-=(const long double u);
265 mpreal& operator-=(const double u);
266 mpreal& operator-=(const unsigned long int u);
267 mpreal& operator-=(const unsigned int u);
268 mpreal& operator-=(const long int u);
269 mpreal& operator-=(const int u);
270 const mpreal operator-() const;
271 friend const mpreal operator-(const unsigned long int b, const mpreal& a);
272 friend const mpreal operator-(const unsigned int b, const mpreal& a);
273 friend const mpreal operator-(const long int b, const mpreal& a);
274 friend const mpreal operator-(const int b, const mpreal& a);
275 friend const mpreal operator-(const double b, const mpreal& a);
276 mpreal& operator-- ();
277 const mpreal operator-- (int);
278
279 // *
280 mpreal& operator*=(const mpreal& v);
281 mpreal& operator*=(const mpz_t v);
282 mpreal& operator*=(const mpq_t v);
283 mpreal& operator*=(const long double v);
284 mpreal& operator*=(const double v);
285 mpreal& operator*=(const unsigned long int v);
286 mpreal& operator*=(const unsigned int v);
287 mpreal& operator*=(const long int v);
288 mpreal& operator*=(const int v);
289
290 // /
291 mpreal& operator/=(const mpreal& v);
292 mpreal& operator/=(const mpz_t v);
293 mpreal& operator/=(const mpq_t v);
294 mpreal& operator/=(const long double v);
295 mpreal& operator/=(const double v);
296 mpreal& operator/=(const unsigned long int v);
297 mpreal& operator/=(const unsigned int v);
298 mpreal& operator/=(const long int v);
299 mpreal& operator/=(const int v);
300 friend const mpreal operator/(const unsigned long int b, const mpreal& a);
301 friend const mpreal operator/(const unsigned int b, const mpreal& a);
302 friend const mpreal operator/(const long int b, const mpreal& a);
303 friend const mpreal operator/(const int b, const mpreal& a);
304 friend const mpreal operator/(const double b, const mpreal& a);
305
306 //<<= Fast Multiplication by 2^u
307 mpreal& operator<<=(const unsigned long int u);
308 mpreal& operator<<=(const unsigned int u);
309 mpreal& operator<<=(const long int u);
310 mpreal& operator<<=(const int u);
311
312 //>>= Fast Division by 2^u
313 mpreal& operator>>=(const unsigned long int u);
314 mpreal& operator>>=(const unsigned int u);
315 mpreal& operator>>=(const long int u);
316 mpreal& operator>>=(const int u);
317
318 // Type Conversion operators
319 bool toBool ( ) const;
320 long toLong (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDZ) const;
321 unsigned long toULong (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDZ) const;
322 long long toLLong (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDZ) const;
323 unsigned long long toULLong (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDZ) const;
324 float toFloat (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDN) const;
325 double toDouble (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDN) const;
326 long double toLDouble (mp_rnd_t mode = GMP_RNDN) const;
327
328#if defined (MPREAL_HAVE_EXPLICIT_CONVERTERS)
329 explicit operator bool () const { return toBool(); }
330 explicit operator signed char () const { return (signed char)toLong(); }
331 explicit operator unsigned char () const { return (unsigned char)toULong(); }
332 explicit operator short () const { return (short)toLong(); }
333 explicit operator unsigned short () const { return (unsigned short)toULong();}
334 explicit operator int () const { return (int)toLong(); }
335 explicit operator unsigned int () const { return (unsigned int)toULong(); }
336 explicit operator long () const { return toLong(); }
337 explicit operator unsigned long () const { return toULong(); }
338 explicit operator long long () const { return toLLong(); }
339 explicit operator unsigned long long () const { return toULLong(); }
340 explicit operator float () const { return toFloat(); }
341 explicit operator double () const { return toDouble(); }
342 explicit operator long double () const { return toLDouble(); }
343#endif
344
345 // Get raw pointers so that mpreal can be directly used in raw mpfr_* functions
346 ::mpfr_ptr mpfr_ptr();
347 ::mpfr_srcptr mpfr_ptr() const;
348 ::mpfr_srcptr mpfr_srcptr() const;
349
350 // Convert mpreal to string with n significant digits in base b
351 // n = -1 -> convert with the maximum available digits
352 std::string toString(int n = -1, int b = 10, mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) const;
353
354#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
355 std::string toString(const std::string& format) const;
356#endif
357
358 std::ostream& output(std::ostream& os) const;
359
360 // Math Functions
361 friend const mpreal sqr (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
362 friend const mpreal sqrt(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
363 friend const mpreal sqrt(const unsigned long int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
364 friend const mpreal cbrt(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
365 friend const mpreal root(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
366 friend const mpreal pow (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
367 friend const mpreal pow (const mpreal& a, const mpz_t b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
368 friend const mpreal pow (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
369 friend const mpreal pow (const mpreal& a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
370 friend const mpreal pow (const unsigned long int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
371 friend const mpreal pow (const unsigned long int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
372 friend const mpreal fabs(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
373
374 friend const mpreal abs(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
375 friend const mpreal dim(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
376 friend inline const mpreal mul_2ui(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
377 friend inline const mpreal mul_2si(const mpreal& v, long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
378 friend inline const mpreal div_2ui(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
379 friend inline const mpreal div_2si(const mpreal& v, long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
380 friend int cmpabs(const mpreal& a,const mpreal& b);
381
382 friend const mpreal log (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
383 friend const mpreal log2 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
384 friend const mpreal logb (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
385 friend mp_exp_t ilogb(const mpreal& v);
386 friend const mpreal log10(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
387 friend const mpreal exp (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
388 friend const mpreal exp2 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
389 friend const mpreal exp10(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
390 friend const mpreal log1p(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
391 friend const mpreal expm1(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
392
393 friend const mpreal nextpow2(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
394
395 friend const mpreal cos(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
396 friend const mpreal sin(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
397 friend const mpreal tan(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
398 friend const mpreal sec(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
399 friend const mpreal csc(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
400 friend const mpreal cot(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
401 friend int sin_cos(mpreal& s, mpreal& c, const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
402
403 friend const mpreal acos (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
404 friend const mpreal asin (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
405 friend const mpreal atan (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
406 friend const mpreal atan2 (const mpreal& y, const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
407 friend const mpreal acot (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
408 friend const mpreal asec (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
409 friend const mpreal acsc (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
410
411 friend const mpreal cosh (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
412 friend const mpreal sinh (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
413 friend const mpreal tanh (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
414 friend const mpreal sech (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
415 friend const mpreal csch (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
416 friend const mpreal coth (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
417 friend const mpreal acosh (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
418 friend const mpreal asinh (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
419 friend const mpreal atanh (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
420 friend const mpreal acoth (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
421 friend const mpreal asech (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
422 friend const mpreal acsch (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
423
424 friend const mpreal hypot (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
425
426 friend const mpreal fac_ui (unsigned long int v, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
427 friend const mpreal eint (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
428
429 friend const mpreal gamma (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
430 friend const mpreal tgamma (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
431 friend const mpreal lngamma (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
432 friend const mpreal lgamma (const mpreal& v, int *signp, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
433 friend const mpreal zeta (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
434 friend const mpreal erf (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
435 friend const mpreal erfc (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
436 friend const mpreal besselj0 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
437 friend const mpreal besselj1 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
438 friend const mpreal besseljn (long n, const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
439 friend const mpreal bessely0 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
440 friend const mpreal bessely1 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
441 friend const mpreal besselyn (long n, const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
442 friend const mpreal fma (const mpreal& v1, const mpreal& v2, const mpreal& v3, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
443 friend const mpreal fms (const mpreal& v1, const mpreal& v2, const mpreal& v3, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
444 friend const mpreal agm (const mpreal& v1, const mpreal& v2, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
445 friend const mpreal sum (const mpreal tab[], const unsigned long int n, int& status, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
446 friend int sgn (const mpreal& v);
447
448// MPFR 2.4.0 Specifics
449#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
450 friend int sinh_cosh (mpreal& s, mpreal& c, const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
451 friend const mpreal li2 (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
452 friend const mpreal fmod (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
453 friend const mpreal rec_sqrt (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
454
455 // MATLAB's semantic equivalents
456 friend const mpreal rem (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode); // Remainder after division
457 friend const mpreal mod (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode); // Modulus after division
458#endif
459
460#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
461 friend const mpreal digamma (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
462 friend const mpreal ai (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
463 friend const mpreal urandom (gmp_randstate_t& state, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode); // use gmp_randinit_default() to init state, gmp_randclear() to clear
464#endif
465
466#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,1,0))
467 friend const mpreal grandom (gmp_randstate_t& state, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode); // use gmp_randinit_default() to init state, gmp_randclear() to clear
468 friend const mpreal grandom (unsigned int seed);
469#endif
470
471 // Uniformly distributed random number generation in [0,1] using
472 // Mersenne-Twister algorithm by default.
473 // Use parameter to setup seed, e.g.: random((unsigned)time(NULL))
474 // Check urandom() for more precise control.
475 friend const mpreal random(unsigned int seed);
476
477 // Splits mpreal value into fractional and integer parts.
478 // Returns fractional part and stores integer part in n.
479 friend const mpreal modf(const mpreal& v, mpreal& n);
480
481 // Constants
482 // don't forget to call mpfr_free_cache() for every thread where you are using const-functions
483 friend const mpreal const_log2 (mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
484 friend const mpreal const_pi (mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
485 friend const mpreal const_euler (mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
486 friend const mpreal const_catalan (mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
487
488 // returns +inf iff sign>=0 otherwise -inf
489 friend const mpreal const_infinity(int sign, mp_prec_t prec);
490
491 // Output/ Input
492 friend std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const mpreal& v);
493 friend std::istream& operator>>(std::istream& is, mpreal& v);
494
495 // Integer Related Functions
496 friend const mpreal rint (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
497 friend const mpreal ceil (const mpreal& v);
498 friend const mpreal floor(const mpreal& v);
499 friend const mpreal round(const mpreal& v);
500 friend long lround(const mpreal& v);
501 friend long long llround(const mpreal& v);
502 friend const mpreal trunc(const mpreal& v);
503 friend const mpreal rint_ceil (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
504 friend const mpreal rint_floor (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
505 friend const mpreal rint_round (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
506 friend const mpreal rint_trunc (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
507 friend const mpreal frac (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
508 friend const mpreal remainder (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
509 friend const mpreal remquo (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, int* q, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
510
511 // Miscellaneous Functions
512 friend const mpreal nexttoward (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y);
513 friend const mpreal nextabove (const mpreal& x);
514 friend const mpreal nextbelow (const mpreal& x);
515
516 // use gmp_randinit_default() to init state, gmp_randclear() to clear
517 friend const mpreal urandomb (gmp_randstate_t& state);
518
519// MPFR < 2.4.2 Specifics
520#if (MPFR_VERSION <= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,2))
521 friend const mpreal random2 (mp_size_t size, mp_exp_t exp);
522#endif
523
524 // Instance Checkers
525 friend bool isnan (const mpreal& v);
526 friend bool isinf (const mpreal& v);
527 friend bool isfinite (const mpreal& v);
528
529 friend bool isnum (const mpreal& v);
530 friend bool iszero (const mpreal& v);
531 friend bool isint (const mpreal& v);
532
533#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
534 friend bool isregular(const mpreal& v);
535#endif
536
537 // Set/Get instance properties
538 inline mp_prec_t get_prec() const;
539 inline void set_prec(mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = get_default_rnd()); // Change precision with rounding mode
540
541 // Aliases for get_prec(), set_prec() - needed for compatibility with std::complex<mpreal> interface
542 inline mpreal& setPrecision(int Precision, mp_rnd_t RoundingMode = get_default_rnd());
543 inline int getPrecision() const;
544
545 // Set mpreal to +/- inf, NaN, +/-0
546 mpreal& setInf (int Sign = +1);
547 mpreal& setNan ();
548 mpreal& setZero (int Sign = +1);
549 mpreal& setSign (int Sign, mp_rnd_t RoundingMode = get_default_rnd());
550
551 //Exponent
552 mp_exp_t get_exp() const;
553 int set_exp(mp_exp_t e);
554 int check_range (int t, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = get_default_rnd());
555 int subnormalize (int t, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = get_default_rnd());
556
557 // Inexact conversion from float
558 inline bool fits_in_bits(double x, int n);
559
560 // Set/Get global properties
561 static void set_default_prec(mp_prec_t prec);
562 static void set_default_rnd(mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
563
564 static mp_exp_t get_emin (void);
565 static mp_exp_t get_emax (void);
566 static mp_exp_t get_emin_min (void);
567 static mp_exp_t get_emin_max (void);
568 static mp_exp_t get_emax_min (void);
569 static mp_exp_t get_emax_max (void);
570 static int set_emin (mp_exp_t exp);
571 static int set_emax (mp_exp_t exp);
572
573 // Efficient swapping of two mpreal values - needed for std algorithms
574 friend void swap(mpreal& x, mpreal& y);
575
576 friend const mpreal fmax(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
577 friend const mpreal fmin(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode);
578
579private:
580 // Human friendly Debug Preview in Visual Studio.
581 // Put one of these lines:
582 //
583 // mpfr::mpreal=<DebugView> ; Show value only
584 // mpfr::mpreal=<DebugView>, <mp[0]._mpfr_prec,u>bits ; Show value & precision
585 //
586 // at the beginning of
587 // [Visual Studio Installation Folder]\Common7\Packages\Debugger\autoexp.dat
588 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_DATA
589
590 // "Smart" resources deallocation. Checks if instance initialized before deletion.
591 void clear(::mpfr_ptr);
592};
593
595// Exceptions
596class conversion_overflow : public std::exception {
597public:
598 std::string why() { return "inexact conversion from floating point"; }
599};
600
602// Constructors & converters
603// Default constructor: creates mp number and initializes it to 0.
604inline mpreal::mpreal()
605{
606 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(), mpreal::get_default_prec());
607 mpfr_set_zero_fast(mpfr_ptr());
608
609 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
610}
611
612inline mpreal::mpreal(const mpreal& u)
613{
614 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_get_prec(u.mpfr_srcptr()));
615 mpfr_set (mpfr_ptr(),u.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
616
617 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
618}
619
620#ifdef MPREAL_HAVE_MOVE_SUPPORT
621inline mpreal::mpreal(mpreal&& other)
622{
623 mpfr_set_uninitialized(mpfr_ptr()); // make sure "other" holds null-pointer (in uninitialized state)
624 mpfr_swap(mpfr_ptr(), other.mpfr_ptr());
625
626 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
627}
628
629inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(mpreal&& other)
630{
631 if (this != &other)
632 {
633 mpfr_swap(mpfr_ptr(), other.mpfr_ptr()); // destructor for "other" will be called just afterwards
634 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
635 }
636 return *this;
637}
638#endif
639
640inline mpreal::mpreal(const mpfr_t u, bool shared)
641{
642 if(shared)
643 {
644 std::memcpy(mpfr_ptr(), u, sizeof(mpfr_t));
645 }
646 else
647 {
648 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(), mpfr_get_prec(u));
649 mpfr_set (mpfr_ptr(), u, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
650 }
651
652 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
653}
654
655inline mpreal::mpreal(const mpf_t u)
656{
657 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(),(mp_prec_t) mpf_get_prec(u)); // (gmp: mp_bitcnt_t) unsigned long -> long (mpfr: mp_prec_t)
658 mpfr_set_f(mpfr_ptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
659
660 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
661}
662
663inline mpreal::mpreal(const mpz_t u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
664{
665 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(), prec);
666 mpfr_set_z(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
667
668 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
669}
670
671inline mpreal::mpreal(const mpq_t u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
672{
673 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(), prec);
674 mpfr_set_q(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
675
676 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
677}
678
679inline mpreal::mpreal(const double u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
680{
681 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(), prec);
682
683#if (MPREAL_DOUBLE_BITS_OVERFLOW > -1)
684 if(fits_in_bits(u, MPREAL_DOUBLE_BITS_OVERFLOW))
685 {
686 mpfr_set_d(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
687 }else
688 throw conversion_overflow();
689#else
690 mpfr_set_d(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
691#endif
692
693 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
694}
695
696inline mpreal::mpreal(const long double u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
697{
698 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
699 mpfr_set_ld(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
700
701 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
702}
703
704inline mpreal::mpreal(const unsigned long long int u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
705{
706 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
707 mpfr_set_uj(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
708
709 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
710}
711
712inline mpreal::mpreal(const long long int u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
713{
714 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
715 mpfr_set_sj(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
716
717 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
718}
719
720inline mpreal::mpreal(const unsigned long int u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
721{
722 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
723 mpfr_set_ui(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
724
725 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
726}
727
728inline mpreal::mpreal(const unsigned int u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
729{
730 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
731 mpfr_set_ui(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
732
733 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
734}
735
736inline mpreal::mpreal(const long int u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
737{
738 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
739 mpfr_set_si(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
740
741 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
742}
743
744inline mpreal::mpreal(const int u, mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t mode)
745{
746 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
747 mpfr_set_si(mpfr_ptr(), u, mode);
748
749 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
750}
751
752inline mpreal::mpreal(const char* s, mp_prec_t prec, int base, mp_rnd_t mode)
753{
754 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
755 mpfr_set_str(mpfr_ptr(), s, base, mode);
756
757 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
758}
759
760inline mpreal::mpreal(const std::string& s, mp_prec_t prec, int base, mp_rnd_t mode)
761{
762 mpfr_init2 (mpfr_ptr(), prec);
763 mpfr_set_str(mpfr_ptr(), s.c_str(), base, mode);
764
765 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
766}
767
768inline void mpreal::clear(::mpfr_ptr x)
769{
770#ifdef MPREAL_HAVE_MOVE_SUPPORT
771 if(mpfr_is_initialized(x))
772#endif
773 mpfr_clear(x);
774}
775
776inline mpreal::~mpreal()
777{
778 clear(mpfr_ptr());
779}
780
781// internal namespace needed for template magic
782namespace internal{
783
784 // Use SFINAE to restrict arithmetic operations instantiation only for numeric types
785 // This is needed for smooth integration with libraries based on expression templates, like Eigen.
786 // TODO: Do the same for boolean operators.
787 template <typename ArgumentType> struct result_type {};
788
789 template <> struct result_type<mpreal> {typedef mpreal type;};
790 template <> struct result_type<mpz_t> {typedef mpreal type;};
791 template <> struct result_type<mpq_t> {typedef mpreal type;};
792 template <> struct result_type<long double> {typedef mpreal type;};
793 template <> struct result_type<double> {typedef mpreal type;};
794 template <> struct result_type<unsigned long int> {typedef mpreal type;};
795 template <> struct result_type<unsigned int> {typedef mpreal type;};
796 template <> struct result_type<long int> {typedef mpreal type;};
797 template <> struct result_type<int> {typedef mpreal type;};
798 template <> struct result_type<long long> {typedef mpreal type;};
799 template <> struct result_type<unsigned long long> {typedef mpreal type;};
800}
801
802// + Addition
803template <typename Rhs>
804inline const typename internal::result_type<Rhs>::type
805 operator+(const mpreal& lhs, const Rhs& rhs){ return mpreal(lhs) += rhs; }
806
807template <typename Lhs>
808inline const typename internal::result_type<Lhs>::type
809 operator+(const Lhs& lhs, const mpreal& rhs){ return mpreal(rhs) += lhs; }
810
811// - Subtraction
812template <typename Rhs>
813inline const typename internal::result_type<Rhs>::type
814 operator-(const mpreal& lhs, const Rhs& rhs){ return mpreal(lhs) -= rhs; }
815
816template <typename Lhs>
817inline const typename internal::result_type<Lhs>::type
818 operator-(const Lhs& lhs, const mpreal& rhs){ return mpreal(lhs) -= rhs; }
819
820// * Multiplication
821template <typename Rhs>
822inline const typename internal::result_type<Rhs>::type
823 operator*(const mpreal& lhs, const Rhs& rhs){ return mpreal(lhs) *= rhs; }
824
825template <typename Lhs>
826inline const typename internal::result_type<Lhs>::type
827 operator*(const Lhs& lhs, const mpreal& rhs){ return mpreal(rhs) *= lhs; }
828
829// / Division
830template <typename Rhs>
831inline const typename internal::result_type<Rhs>::type
832 operator/(const mpreal& lhs, const Rhs& rhs){ return mpreal(lhs) /= rhs; }
833
834template <typename Lhs>
835inline const typename internal::result_type<Lhs>::type
836 operator/(const Lhs& lhs, const mpreal& rhs){ return mpreal(lhs) /= rhs; }
837
839// sqrt
840const mpreal sqrt(const unsigned int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
841const mpreal sqrt(const long int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
842const mpreal sqrt(const int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
843const mpreal sqrt(const long double v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
844const mpreal sqrt(const double v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
845
846// abs
847inline const mpreal abs(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
848
850// pow
851const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
852const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
853const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
854const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
855
856const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
857const mpreal pow(const long int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
858const mpreal pow(const int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
859const mpreal pow(const long double a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
860const mpreal pow(const double a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
861
862const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
863const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
864const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
865const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
866const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
867
868const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
869const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
870const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
871const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
872const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
873const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
874
875const mpreal pow(const long int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
876const mpreal pow(const long int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
877const mpreal pow(const long int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
878const mpreal pow(const long int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
879const mpreal pow(const long int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
880const mpreal pow(const long int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
881
882const mpreal pow(const int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
883const mpreal pow(const int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
884const mpreal pow(const int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
885const mpreal pow(const int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
886const mpreal pow(const int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
887const mpreal pow(const int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
888
889const mpreal pow(const long double a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
890const mpreal pow(const long double a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
891const mpreal pow(const long double a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
892const mpreal pow(const long double a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
893const mpreal pow(const long double a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
894
895const mpreal pow(const double a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
896const mpreal pow(const double a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
897const mpreal pow(const double a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
898const mpreal pow(const double a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
899const mpreal pow(const double a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
900
901inline const mpreal mul_2ui(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
902inline const mpreal mul_2si(const mpreal& v, long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
903inline const mpreal div_2ui(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
904inline const mpreal div_2si(const mpreal& v, long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd());
905
907// Estimate machine epsilon for the given precision
908// Returns smallest eps such that 1.0 + eps != 1.0
909inline mpreal machine_epsilon(mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec());
910
911// Returns smallest eps such that x + eps != x (relative machine epsilon)
912inline mpreal machine_epsilon(const mpreal& x);
913
914// Gives max & min values for the required precision,
915// minval is 'safe' meaning 1 / minval does not overflow
916// maxval is 'safe' meaning 1 / maxval does not underflow
917inline mpreal minval(mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec());
918inline mpreal maxval(mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec());
919
920// 'Dirty' equality check 1: |a-b| < min{|a|,|b|} * eps
921inline bool isEqualFuzzy(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, const mpreal& eps);
922
923// 'Dirty' equality check 2: |a-b| < min{|a|,|b|} * eps( min{|a|,|b|} )
924inline bool isEqualFuzzy(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b);
925
926// 'Bitwise' equality check
927// maxUlps - a and b can be apart by maxUlps binary numbers.
928inline bool isEqualUlps(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, int maxUlps);
929
931// Convert precision in 'bits' to decimal digits and vice versa.
932// bits = ceil(digits*log[2](10))
933// digits = floor(bits*log[10](2))
934
935inline mp_prec_t digits2bits(int d);
936inline int bits2digits(mp_prec_t b);
937
939// min, max
940const mpreal (max)(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y);
941const mpreal (min)(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y);
942
944// Implementation
946
948// Operators - Assignment
949inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const mpreal& v)
950{
951 if (this != &v)
952 {
953 mp_prec_t tp = mpfr_get_prec( mpfr_srcptr());
954 mp_prec_t vp = mpfr_get_prec(v.mpfr_srcptr());
955
956 if(tp != vp){
957 clear(mpfr_ptr());
958 mpfr_init2(mpfr_ptr(), vp);
959 }
960
961 mpfr_set(mpfr_ptr(), v.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
962
963 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
964 }
965 return *this;
966}
967
968inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const mpf_t v)
969{
970 mpfr_set_f(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
971
972 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
973 return *this;
974}
975
976inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const mpz_t v)
977{
978 mpfr_set_z(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
979
980 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
981 return *this;
982}
983
984inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const mpq_t v)
985{
986 mpfr_set_q(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
987
988 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
989 return *this;
990}
991
992inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const long double v)
993{
994 mpfr_set_ld(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
995
996 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
997 return *this;
998}
999
1000inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const double v)
1001{
1002#if (MPREAL_DOUBLE_BITS_OVERFLOW > -1)
1003 if(fits_in_bits(v, MPREAL_DOUBLE_BITS_OVERFLOW))
1004 {
1005 mpfr_set_d(mpfr_ptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1006 }else
1007 throw conversion_overflow();
1008#else
1009 mpfr_set_d(mpfr_ptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1010#endif
1011
1012 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1013 return *this;
1014}
1015
1016inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const unsigned long int v)
1017{
1018 mpfr_set_ui(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1019
1020 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1021 return *this;
1022}
1023
1024inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const unsigned int v)
1025{
1026 mpfr_set_ui(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1027
1028 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1029 return *this;
1030}
1031
1032inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const unsigned long long int v)
1033{
1034 mpfr_set_uj(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1035
1036 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1037 return *this;
1038}
1039
1040inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const long long int v)
1041{
1042 mpfr_set_sj(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1043
1044 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1045 return *this;
1046}
1047
1048inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const long int v)
1049{
1050 mpfr_set_si(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1051
1052 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1053 return *this;
1054}
1055
1056inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const int v)
1057{
1058 mpfr_set_si(mpfr_ptr(), v, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1059
1060 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1061 return *this;
1062}
1063
1064inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const char* s)
1065{
1066 // Use other converters for more precise control on base & precision & rounding:
1067 //
1068 // mpreal(const char* s, mp_prec_t prec, int base, mp_rnd_t mode)
1069 // mpreal(const std::string& s,mp_prec_t prec, int base, mp_rnd_t mode)
1070 //
1071 // Here we assume base = 10 and we use precision of target variable.
1072
1073 mpfr_t t;
1074
1075 mpfr_init2(t, mpfr_get_prec(mpfr_srcptr()));
1076
1077 if(0 == mpfr_set_str(t, s, 10, mpreal::get_default_rnd()))
1078 {
1079 mpfr_set(mpfr_ptr(), t, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1080 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1081 }
1082
1083 clear(t);
1084 return *this;
1085}
1086
1087inline mpreal& mpreal::operator=(const std::string& s)
1088{
1089 // Use other converters for more precise control on base & precision & rounding:
1090 //
1091 // mpreal(const char* s, mp_prec_t prec, int base, mp_rnd_t mode)
1092 // mpreal(const std::string& s,mp_prec_t prec, int base, mp_rnd_t mode)
1093 //
1094 // Here we assume base = 10 and we use precision of target variable.
1095
1096 mpfr_t t;
1097
1098 mpfr_init2(t, mpfr_get_prec(mpfr_srcptr()));
1099
1100 if(0 == mpfr_set_str(t, s.c_str(), 10, mpreal::get_default_rnd()))
1101 {
1102 mpfr_set(mpfr_ptr(), t, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1103 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1104 }
1105
1106 clear(t);
1107 return *this;
1108}
1109
1110template <typename real_t>
1111inline mpreal& mpreal::operator= (const std::complex<real_t>& z)
1112{
1113 return *this = z.real();
1114}
1115
1117// + Addition
1118inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const mpreal& v)
1119{
1120 mpfr_add(mpfr_ptr(), mpfr_srcptr(), v.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1121 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1122 return *this;
1123}
1124
1125inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const mpf_t u)
1126{
1127 *this += mpreal(u);
1128 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1129 return *this;
1130}
1131
1132inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const mpz_t u)
1133{
1134 mpfr_add_z(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1135 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1136 return *this;
1137}
1138
1139inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const mpq_t u)
1140{
1141 mpfr_add_q(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1142 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1143 return *this;
1144}
1145
1146inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+= (const long double u)
1147{
1148 *this += mpreal(u);
1149 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1150 return *this;
1151}
1152
1153inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+= (const double u)
1154{
1155#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1156 mpfr_add_d(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1157#else
1158 *this += mpreal(u);
1159#endif
1160
1161 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1162 return *this;
1163}
1164
1165inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const unsigned long int u)
1166{
1167 mpfr_add_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1168 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1169 return *this;
1170}
1171
1172inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const unsigned int u)
1173{
1174 mpfr_add_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1175 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1176 return *this;
1177}
1178
1179inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const long int u)
1180{
1181 mpfr_add_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1182 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1183 return *this;
1184}
1185
1186inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const int u)
1187{
1188 mpfr_add_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1189 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1190 return *this;
1191}
1192
1193inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const long long int u) { *this += mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1194inline mpreal& mpreal::operator+=(const unsigned long long int u){ *this += mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1195inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const long long int u) { *this -= mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1196inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const unsigned long long int u){ *this -= mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1197inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const long long int u) { *this *= mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1198inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const unsigned long long int u){ *this *= mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1199inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const long long int u) { *this /= mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1200inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const unsigned long long int u){ *this /= mpreal(u); MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE; return *this; }
1201
1202inline const mpreal mpreal::operator+()const { return mpreal(*this); }
1203
1204inline const mpreal operator+(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b)
1205{
1206 mpreal c(0, (std::max)(mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()), mpfr_get_prec(b.mpfr_ptr())));
1207 mpfr_add(c.mpfr_ptr(), a.mpfr_srcptr(), b.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1208 return c;
1209}
1210
1211inline mpreal& mpreal::operator++()
1212{
1213 return *this += 1;
1214}
1215
1216inline const mpreal mpreal::operator++ (int)
1217{
1218 mpreal x(*this);
1219 *this += 1;
1220 return x;
1221}
1222
1223inline mpreal& mpreal::operator--()
1224{
1225 return *this -= 1;
1226}
1227
1228inline const mpreal mpreal::operator-- (int)
1229{
1230 mpreal x(*this);
1231 *this -= 1;
1232 return x;
1233}
1234
1236// - Subtraction
1237inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const mpreal& v)
1238{
1239 mpfr_sub(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1240 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1241 return *this;
1242}
1243
1244inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const mpz_t v)
1245{
1246 mpfr_sub_z(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1247 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1248 return *this;
1249}
1250
1251inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const mpq_t v)
1252{
1253 mpfr_sub_q(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1254 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1255 return *this;
1256}
1257
1258inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const long double v)
1259{
1260 *this -= mpreal(v);
1261 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1262 return *this;
1263}
1264
1265inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const double v)
1266{
1267#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1268 mpfr_sub_d(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1269#else
1270 *this -= mpreal(v);
1271#endif
1272
1273 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1274 return *this;
1275}
1276
1277inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const unsigned long int v)
1278{
1279 mpfr_sub_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1280 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1281 return *this;
1282}
1283
1284inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const unsigned int v)
1285{
1286 mpfr_sub_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1287 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1288 return *this;
1289}
1290
1291inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const long int v)
1292{
1293 mpfr_sub_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1294 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1295 return *this;
1296}
1297
1298inline mpreal& mpreal::operator-=(const int v)
1299{
1300 mpfr_sub_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1301 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1302 return *this;
1303}
1304
1305inline const mpreal mpreal::operator-()const
1306{
1307 mpreal u(*this);
1308 mpfr_neg(u.mpfr_ptr(),u.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1309 return u;
1310}
1311
1312inline const mpreal operator-(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b)
1313{
1314 mpreal c(0, (std::max)(mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()), mpfr_get_prec(b.mpfr_ptr())));
1315 mpfr_sub(c.mpfr_ptr(), a.mpfr_srcptr(), b.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1316 return c;
1317}
1318
1319inline const mpreal operator-(const double b, const mpreal& a)
1320{
1321#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1322 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1323 mpfr_d_sub(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1324 return x;
1325#else
1326 mpreal x(b, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1327 x -= a;
1328 return x;
1329#endif
1330}
1331
1332inline const mpreal operator-(const unsigned long int b, const mpreal& a)
1333{
1334 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1335 mpfr_ui_sub(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1336 return x;
1337}
1338
1339inline const mpreal operator-(const unsigned int b, const mpreal& a)
1340{
1341 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1342 mpfr_ui_sub(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1343 return x;
1344}
1345
1346inline const mpreal operator-(const long int b, const mpreal& a)
1347{
1348 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1349 mpfr_si_sub(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1350 return x;
1351}
1352
1353inline const mpreal operator-(const int b, const mpreal& a)
1354{
1355 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1356 mpfr_si_sub(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1357 return x;
1358}
1359
1361// * Multiplication
1362inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*= (const mpreal& v)
1363{
1364 mpfr_mul(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1365 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1366 return *this;
1367}
1368
1369inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const mpz_t v)
1370{
1371 mpfr_mul_z(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1372 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1373 return *this;
1374}
1375
1376inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const mpq_t v)
1377{
1378 mpfr_mul_q(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1379 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1380 return *this;
1381}
1382
1383inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const long double v)
1384{
1385 *this *= mpreal(v);
1386 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1387 return *this;
1388}
1389
1390inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const double v)
1391{
1392#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1393 mpfr_mul_d(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1394#else
1395 *this *= mpreal(v);
1396#endif
1397 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1398 return *this;
1399}
1400
1401inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const unsigned long int v)
1402{
1403 mpfr_mul_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1404 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1405 return *this;
1406}
1407
1408inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const unsigned int v)
1409{
1410 mpfr_mul_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1411 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1412 return *this;
1413}
1414
1415inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const long int v)
1416{
1417 mpfr_mul_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1418 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1419 return *this;
1420}
1421
1422inline mpreal& mpreal::operator*=(const int v)
1423{
1424 mpfr_mul_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1425 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1426 return *this;
1427}
1428
1429inline const mpreal operator*(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b)
1430{
1431 mpreal c(0, (std::max)(mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()), mpfr_get_prec(b.mpfr_ptr())));
1432 mpfr_mul(c.mpfr_ptr(), a.mpfr_srcptr(), b.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1433 return c;
1434}
1435
1437// / Division
1438inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const mpreal& v)
1439{
1440 mpfr_div(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1441 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1442 return *this;
1443}
1444
1445inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const mpz_t v)
1446{
1447 mpfr_div_z(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1448 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1449 return *this;
1450}
1451
1452inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const mpq_t v)
1453{
1454 mpfr_div_q(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1455 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1456 return *this;
1457}
1458
1459inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const long double v)
1460{
1461 *this /= mpreal(v);
1462 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1463 return *this;
1464}
1465
1466inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const double v)
1467{
1468#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1469 mpfr_div_d(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1470#else
1471 *this /= mpreal(v);
1472#endif
1473 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1474 return *this;
1475}
1476
1477inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const unsigned long int v)
1478{
1479 mpfr_div_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1480 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1481 return *this;
1482}
1483
1484inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const unsigned int v)
1485{
1486 mpfr_div_ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1487 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1488 return *this;
1489}
1490
1491inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const long int v)
1492{
1493 mpfr_div_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1494 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1495 return *this;
1496}
1497
1498inline mpreal& mpreal::operator/=(const int v)
1499{
1500 mpfr_div_si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),v,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1501 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1502 return *this;
1503}
1504
1505inline const mpreal operator/(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b)
1506{
1507 mpreal c(0, (std::max)(mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()), mpfr_get_prec(b.mpfr_srcptr())));
1508 mpfr_div(c.mpfr_ptr(), a.mpfr_srcptr(), b.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1509 return c;
1510}
1511
1512inline const mpreal operator/(const unsigned long int b, const mpreal& a)
1513{
1514 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()));
1515 mpfr_ui_div(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1516 return x;
1517}
1518
1519inline const mpreal operator/(const unsigned int b, const mpreal& a)
1520{
1521 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()));
1522 mpfr_ui_div(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1523 return x;
1524}
1525
1526inline const mpreal operator/(const long int b, const mpreal& a)
1527{
1528 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()));
1529 mpfr_si_div(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1530 return x;
1531}
1532
1533inline const mpreal operator/(const int b, const mpreal& a)
1534{
1535 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()));
1536 mpfr_si_div(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1537 return x;
1538}
1539
1540inline const mpreal operator/(const double b, const mpreal& a)
1541{
1542#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1543 mpreal x(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()));
1544 mpfr_d_div(x.mpfr_ptr(), b, a.mpfr_srcptr(), mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1545 return x;
1546#else
1547 mpreal x(b, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_ptr()));
1548 x /= a;
1549 return x;
1550#endif
1551}
1552
1554// Shifts operators - Multiplication/Division by power of 2
1555inline mpreal& mpreal::operator<<=(const unsigned long int u)
1556{
1557 mpfr_mul_2ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1558 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1559 return *this;
1560}
1561
1562inline mpreal& mpreal::operator<<=(const unsigned int u)
1563{
1564 mpfr_mul_2ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),static_cast<unsigned long int>(u),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1565 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1566 return *this;
1567}
1568
1569inline mpreal& mpreal::operator<<=(const long int u)
1570{
1571 mpfr_mul_2si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1572 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1573 return *this;
1574}
1575
1576inline mpreal& mpreal::operator<<=(const int u)
1577{
1578 mpfr_mul_2si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),static_cast<long int>(u),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1579 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1580 return *this;
1581}
1582
1583inline mpreal& mpreal::operator>>=(const unsigned long int u)
1584{
1585 mpfr_div_2ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1586 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1587 return *this;
1588}
1589
1590inline mpreal& mpreal::operator>>=(const unsigned int u)
1591{
1592 mpfr_div_2ui(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),static_cast<unsigned long int>(u),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1593 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1594 return *this;
1595}
1596
1597inline mpreal& mpreal::operator>>=(const long int u)
1598{
1599 mpfr_div_2si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),u,mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1600 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1601 return *this;
1602}
1603
1604inline mpreal& mpreal::operator>>=(const int u)
1605{
1606 mpfr_div_2si(mpfr_ptr(),mpfr_srcptr(),static_cast<long int>(u),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1607 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1608 return *this;
1609}
1610
1611inline const mpreal operator<<(const mpreal& v, const unsigned long int k)
1612{
1613 return mul_2ui(v,k);
1614}
1615
1616inline const mpreal operator<<(const mpreal& v, const unsigned int k)
1617{
1618 return mul_2ui(v,static_cast<unsigned long int>(k));
1619}
1620
1621inline const mpreal operator<<(const mpreal& v, const long int k)
1622{
1623 return mul_2si(v,k);
1624}
1625
1626inline const mpreal operator<<(const mpreal& v, const int k)
1627{
1628 return mul_2si(v,static_cast<long int>(k));
1629}
1630
1631inline const mpreal operator>>(const mpreal& v, const unsigned long int k)
1632{
1633 return div_2ui(v,k);
1634}
1635
1636inline const mpreal operator>>(const mpreal& v, const long int k)
1637{
1638 return div_2si(v,k);
1639}
1640
1641inline const mpreal operator>>(const mpreal& v, const unsigned int k)
1642{
1643 return div_2ui(v,static_cast<unsigned long int>(k));
1644}
1645
1646inline const mpreal operator>>(const mpreal& v, const int k)
1647{
1648 return div_2si(v,static_cast<long int>(k));
1649}
1650
1651// mul_2ui
1652inline const mpreal mul_2ui(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
1653{
1654 mpreal x(v);
1655 mpfr_mul_2ui(x.mpfr_ptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),k,rnd_mode);
1656 return x;
1657}
1658
1659// mul_2si
1660inline const mpreal mul_2si(const mpreal& v, long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
1661{
1662 mpreal x(v);
1663 mpfr_mul_2si(x.mpfr_ptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),k,rnd_mode);
1664 return x;
1665}
1666
1667inline const mpreal div_2ui(const mpreal& v, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
1668{
1669 mpreal x(v);
1670 mpfr_div_2ui(x.mpfr_ptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),k,rnd_mode);
1671 return x;
1672}
1673
1674inline const mpreal div_2si(const mpreal& v, long int k, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
1675{
1676 mpreal x(v);
1677 mpfr_div_2si(x.mpfr_ptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr(),k,rnd_mode);
1678 return x;
1679}
1680
1682//Relational operators
1683
1684// WARNING:
1685//
1686// Please note that following checks for double-NaN are guaranteed to work only in IEEE math mode:
1687//
1688// isnan(b) = (b != b)
1689// isnan(b) = !(b == b) (we use in code below)
1690//
1691// Be cautions if you use compiler options which break strict IEEE compliance (e.g. -ffast-math in GCC).
1692// Use std::isnan instead (C++11).
1693
1694inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b ){ return (mpfr_greater_p(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1695inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) > 0 ); }
1696inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) > 0 ); }
1697inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) > 0 ); }
1698inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) > 0 ); }
1699inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const long double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_ld(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) > 0 ); }
1700inline bool operator > (const mpreal& a, const double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_d (a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) > 0 ); }
1701
1702inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b ){ return (mpfr_greaterequal_p(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1703inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) >= 0 ); }
1704inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) >= 0 ); }
1705inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) >= 0 ); }
1706inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) >= 0 ); }
1707inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const long double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_ld(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) >= 0 ); }
1708inline bool operator >= (const mpreal& a, const double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_d (a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) >= 0 ); }
1709
1710inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b ){ return (mpfr_less_p(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1711inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) < 0 ); }
1712inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) < 0 ); }
1713inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) < 0 ); }
1714inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) < 0 ); }
1715inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const long double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_ld(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) < 0 ); }
1716inline bool operator < (const mpreal& a, const double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_d (a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) < 0 ); }
1717
1718inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b ){ return (mpfr_lessequal_p(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1719inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) <= 0 ); }
1720inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) <= 0 ); }
1721inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) <= 0 ); }
1722inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) <= 0 ); }
1723inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const long double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_ld(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) <= 0 ); }
1724inline bool operator <= (const mpreal& a, const double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_d (a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) <= 0 ); }
1725
1726inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b ){ return (mpfr_equal_p(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1727inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) == 0 ); }
1728inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_ui(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) == 0 ); }
1729inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const long int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) == 0 ); }
1730inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const int b ){ return !isnan(a) && (mpfr_cmp_si(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) == 0 ); }
1731inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const long double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_ld(a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) == 0 ); }
1732inline bool operator == (const mpreal& a, const double b ){ return !isnan(a) && (b == b) && (mpfr_cmp_d (a.mpfr_srcptr(),b) == 0 ); }
1733
1734inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b ){ return !(a == b); }
1735inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b ){ return !(a == b); }
1736inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b ){ return !(a == b); }
1737inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const long int b ){ return !(a == b); }
1738inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const int b ){ return !(a == b); }
1739inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const long double b ){ return !(a == b); }
1740inline bool operator != (const mpreal& a, const double b ){ return !(a == b); }
1741
1742inline bool isnan (const mpreal& op){ return (mpfr_nan_p (op.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1743inline bool isinf (const mpreal& op){ return (mpfr_inf_p (op.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1744inline bool isfinite (const mpreal& op){ return (mpfr_number_p (op.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1745inline bool iszero (const mpreal& op){ return (mpfr_zero_p (op.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1746inline bool isint (const mpreal& op){ return (mpfr_integer_p(op.mpfr_srcptr()) != 0 ); }
1747
1748#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
1749inline bool isregular(const mpreal& op){ return (mpfr_regular_p(op.mpfr_srcptr()));}
1750#endif
1751
1753// Type Converters
1754inline bool mpreal::toBool ( ) const { return mpfr_zero_p (mpfr_srcptr()) == 0; }
1755inline long mpreal::toLong (mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_si (mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1756inline unsigned long mpreal::toULong (mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_ui (mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1757inline float mpreal::toFloat (mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_flt(mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1758inline double mpreal::toDouble (mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_d (mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1759inline long double mpreal::toLDouble(mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_ld (mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1760inline long long mpreal::toLLong (mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_sj (mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1761inline unsigned long long mpreal::toULLong (mp_rnd_t mode) const { return mpfr_get_uj (mpfr_srcptr(), mode); }
1762
1763inline ::mpfr_ptr mpreal::mpfr_ptr() { return mp; }
1764inline ::mpfr_srcptr mpreal::mpfr_ptr() const { return mp; }
1765inline ::mpfr_srcptr mpreal::mpfr_srcptr() const { return mp; }
1766
1767template <class T>
1768inline std::string toString(T t, std::ios_base & (*f)(std::ios_base&))
1769{
1770 std::ostringstream oss;
1771 oss << f << t;
1772 return oss.str();
1773}
1774
1775#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1776
1777inline std::string mpreal::toString(const std::string& format) const
1778{
1779 char *s = NULL;
1780 std::string out;
1781
1782 if( !format.empty() )
1783 {
1784 if(!(mpfr_asprintf(&s, format.c_str(), mpfr_srcptr()) < 0))
1785 {
1786 out = std::string(s);
1787
1788 mpfr_free_str(s);
1789 }
1790 }
1791
1792 return out;
1793}
1794
1795#endif
1796
1797inline std::string mpreal::toString(int n, int b, mp_rnd_t mode) const
1798{
1799 // TODO: Add extended format specification (f, e, rounding mode) as it done in output operator
1800 (void)b;
1801 (void)mode;
1802
1803#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
1804
1805 std::ostringstream format;
1806
1807 int digits = (n >= 0) ? n : 2 + bits2digits(mpfr_get_prec(mpfr_srcptr()));
1808
1809 format << "%." << digits << "RNg";
1810
1811 return toString(format.str());
1812
1813#else
1814
1815 char *s, *ns = NULL;
1816 size_t slen, nslen;
1817 mp_exp_t exp;
1818 std::string out;
1819
1820 if(mpfr_inf_p(mp))
1821 {
1822 if(mpfr_sgn(mp)>0) return "+Inf";
1823 else return "-Inf";
1824 }
1825
1826 if(mpfr_zero_p(mp)) return "0";
1827 if(mpfr_nan_p(mp)) return "NaN";
1828
1829 s = mpfr_get_str(NULL, &exp, b, 0, mp, mode);
1830 ns = mpfr_get_str(NULL, &exp, b, (std::max)(0,n), mp, mode);
1831
1832 if(s!=NULL && ns!=NULL)
1833 {
1834 slen = strlen(s);
1835 nslen = strlen(ns);
1836 if(nslen<=slen)
1837 {
1838 mpfr_free_str(s);
1839 s = ns;
1840 slen = nslen;
1841 }
1842 else {
1843 mpfr_free_str(ns);
1844 }
1845
1846 // Make human eye-friendly formatting if possible
1847 if (exp>0 && static_cast<size_t>(exp)<slen)
1848 {
1849 if(s[0]=='-')
1850 {
1851 // Remove zeros starting from right end
1852 char* ptr = s+slen-1;
1853 while (*ptr=='0' && ptr>s+exp) ptr--;
1854
1855 if(ptr==s+exp) out = std::string(s,exp+1);
1856 else out = std::string(s,exp+1)+'.'+std::string(s+exp+1,ptr-(s+exp+1)+1);
1857
1858 //out = string(s,exp+1)+'.'+string(s+exp+1);
1859 }
1860 else
1861 {
1862 // Remove zeros starting from right end
1863 char* ptr = s+slen-1;
1864 while (*ptr=='0' && ptr>s+exp-1) ptr--;
1865
1866 if(ptr==s+exp-1) out = std::string(s,exp);
1867 else out = std::string(s,exp)+'.'+std::string(s+exp,ptr-(s+exp)+1);
1868
1869 //out = string(s,exp)+'.'+string(s+exp);
1870 }
1871
1872 }else{ // exp<0 || exp>slen
1873 if(s[0]=='-')
1874 {
1875 // Remove zeros starting from right end
1876 char* ptr = s+slen-1;
1877 while (*ptr=='0' && ptr>s+1) ptr--;
1878
1879 if(ptr==s+1) out = std::string(s,2);
1880 else out = std::string(s,2)+'.'+std::string(s+2,ptr-(s+2)+1);
1881
1882 //out = string(s,2)+'.'+string(s+2);
1883 }
1884 else
1885 {
1886 // Remove zeros starting from right end
1887 char* ptr = s+slen-1;
1888 while (*ptr=='0' && ptr>s) ptr--;
1889
1890 if(ptr==s) out = std::string(s,1);
1891 else out = std::string(s,1)+'.'+std::string(s+1,ptr-(s+1)+1);
1892
1893 //out = string(s,1)+'.'+string(s+1);
1894 }
1895
1896 // Make final string
1897 if(--exp)
1898 {
1899 if(exp>0) out += "e+"+mpfr::toString<mp_exp_t>(exp,std::dec);
1900 else out += "e"+mpfr::toString<mp_exp_t>(exp,std::dec);
1901 }
1902 }
1903
1904 mpfr_free_str(s);
1905 return out;
1906 }else{
1907 return "conversion error!";
1908 }
1909#endif
1910}
1911
1912
1914// I/O
1915inline std::ostream& mpreal::output(std::ostream& os) const
1916{
1917 std::ostringstream format;
1918 const std::ios::fmtflags flags = os.flags();
1919
1920 format << ((flags & std::ios::showpos) ? "%+" : "%");
1921 if (os.precision() >= 0)
1922 format << '.' << os.precision() << "R*"
1923 << ((flags & std::ios::floatfield) == std::ios::fixed ? 'f' :
1924 (flags & std::ios::floatfield) == std::ios::scientific ? 'e' :
1925 'g');
1926 else
1927 format << "R*e";
1928
1929 char *s = NULL;
1930 if(!(mpfr_asprintf(&s, format.str().c_str(),
1931 mpfr::mpreal::get_default_rnd(),
1932 mpfr_srcptr())
1933 < 0))
1934 {
1935 os << std::string(s);
1936 mpfr_free_str(s);
1937 }
1938 return os;
1939}
1940
1941inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const mpreal& v)
1942{
1943 return v.output(os);
1944}
1945
1946inline std::istream& operator>>(std::istream &is, mpreal& v)
1947{
1948 // TODO: use cout::hexfloat and other flags to setup base
1949 std::string tmp;
1950 is >> tmp;
1951 mpfr_set_str(v.mpfr_ptr(), tmp.c_str(), 10, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
1952 return is;
1953}
1954
1956// Bits - decimal digits relation
1957// bits = ceil(digits*log[2](10))
1958// digits = floor(bits*log[10](2))
1959
1960inline mp_prec_t digits2bits(int d)
1961{
1962 const double LOG2_10 = 3.3219280948873624;
1963
1964 return mp_prec_t(std::ceil( d * LOG2_10 ));
1965}
1966
1967inline int bits2digits(mp_prec_t b)
1968{
1969 const double LOG10_2 = 0.30102999566398119;
1970
1971 return int(std::floor( b * LOG10_2 ));
1972}
1973
1975// Set/Get number properties
1976inline mpreal& mpreal::setSign(int sign, mp_rnd_t RoundingMode)
1977{
1978 mpfr_setsign(mpfr_ptr(), mpfr_srcptr(), sign < 0, RoundingMode);
1979 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1980 return *this;
1981}
1982
1983inline int mpreal::getPrecision() const
1984{
1985 return int(mpfr_get_prec(mpfr_srcptr()));
1986}
1987
1988inline mpreal& mpreal::setPrecision(int Precision, mp_rnd_t RoundingMode)
1989{
1990 mpfr_prec_round(mpfr_ptr(), Precision, RoundingMode);
1991 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1992 return *this;
1993}
1994
1995inline mpreal& mpreal::setInf(int sign)
1996{
1997 mpfr_set_inf(mpfr_ptr(), sign);
1998 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
1999 return *this;
2000}
2001
2002inline mpreal& mpreal::setNan()
2003{
2004 mpfr_set_nan(mpfr_ptr());
2005 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
2006 return *this;
2007}
2008
2009inline mpreal& mpreal::setZero(int sign)
2010{
2011#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
2012 mpfr_set_zero(mpfr_ptr(), sign);
2013#else
2014 mpfr_set_si(mpfr_ptr(), 0, (mpfr_get_default_rounding_mode)());
2015 setSign(sign);
2016#endif
2017
2018 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
2019 return *this;
2020}
2021
2022inline mp_prec_t mpreal::get_prec() const
2023{
2024 return mpfr_get_prec(mpfr_srcptr());
2025}
2026
2027inline void mpreal::set_prec(mp_prec_t prec, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2028{
2029 mpfr_prec_round(mpfr_ptr(),prec,rnd_mode);
2030 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
2031}
2032
2033inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_exp () const
2034{
2035 return mpfr_get_exp(mpfr_srcptr());
2036}
2037
2038inline int mpreal::set_exp (mp_exp_t e)
2039{
2040 int x = mpfr_set_exp(mpfr_ptr(), e);
2041 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
2042 return x;
2043}
2044
2045inline mpreal& negate(mpreal& x) // -x in place
2046{
2047 mpfr_neg(x.mpfr_ptr(),x.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
2048 return x;
2049}
2050
2051inline const mpreal frexp(const mpreal& x, mp_exp_t* exp, mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2052{
2053 mpreal y(x);
2054#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,1,0))
2055 mpfr_frexp(exp,y.mpfr_ptr(),x.mpfr_srcptr(),mode);
2056#else
2057 *exp = mpfr_get_exp(y.mpfr_srcptr());
2058 mpfr_set_exp(y.mpfr_ptr(),0);
2059#endif
2060 return y;
2061}
2062
2063inline const mpreal frexp(const mpreal& x, int* exp, mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2064{
2065 mp_exp_t expl;
2066 mpreal y = frexp(x, &expl, mode);
2067 *exp = int(expl);
2068 return y;
2069}
2070
2071inline const mpreal ldexp(const mpreal& v, mp_exp_t exp)
2072{
2073 mpreal x(v);
2074
2075 // rounding is not important since we are just increasing the exponent (= exact operation)
2076 mpfr_mul_2si(x.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), exp, mpreal::get_default_rnd());
2077 return x;
2078}
2079
2080inline const mpreal scalbn(const mpreal& v, mp_exp_t exp)
2081{
2082 return ldexp(v, exp);
2083}
2084
2085inline mpreal machine_epsilon(mp_prec_t prec)
2086{
2087 /* the smallest eps such that 1 + eps != 1 */
2088 return machine_epsilon(mpreal(1, prec));
2089}
2090
2091inline mpreal machine_epsilon(const mpreal& x)
2092{
2093 /* the smallest eps such that x + eps != x */
2094 if( x < 0)
2095 {
2096 return nextabove(-x) + x;
2097 }else{
2098 return nextabove( x) - x;
2099 }
2100}
2101
2102// minval is 'safe' meaning 1 / minval does not overflow
2103inline mpreal minval(mp_prec_t prec)
2104{
2105 /* min = 1/2 * 2^emin = 2^(emin - 1) */
2106 return mpreal(1, prec) << mpreal::get_emin()-1;
2107}
2108
2109// maxval is 'safe' meaning 1 / maxval does not underflow
2110inline mpreal maxval(mp_prec_t prec)
2111{
2112 /* max = (1 - eps) * 2^emax, eps is machine epsilon */
2113 return (mpreal(1, prec) - machine_epsilon(prec)) << mpreal::get_emax();
2114}
2115
2116inline bool isEqualUlps(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, int maxUlps)
2117{
2118 return abs(a - b) <= machine_epsilon((max)(abs(a), abs(b))) * maxUlps;
2119}
2120
2121inline bool isEqualFuzzy(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, const mpreal& eps)
2122{
2123 return abs(a - b) <= eps;
2124}
2125
2126inline bool isEqualFuzzy(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b)
2127{
2128 return isEqualFuzzy(a, b, machine_epsilon((max)(1, (min)(abs(a), abs(b)))));
2129}
2130
2132// C++11 sign functions.
2133inline mpreal copysign(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2134{
2135 mpreal rop(0, mpfr_get_prec(x.mpfr_ptr()));
2136 mpfr_setsign(rop.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), mpfr_signbit(y.mpfr_srcptr()), rnd_mode);
2137 return rop;
2138}
2139
2140inline bool signbit(const mpreal& x)
2141{
2142 return mpfr_signbit(x.mpfr_srcptr());
2143}
2144
2145inline mpreal& setsignbit(mpreal& x, bool minus, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2146{
2147 mpfr_setsign(x.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), minus, rnd_mode);
2148 return x;
2149}
2150
2151inline const mpreal modf(const mpreal& v, mpreal& n)
2152{
2153 mpreal f(v);
2154
2155 // rounding is not important since we are using the same number
2156 mpfr_frac (f.mpfr_ptr(),f.mpfr_srcptr(),mpreal::get_default_rnd());
2157 mpfr_trunc(n.mpfr_ptr(),v.mpfr_srcptr());
2158 return f;
2159}
2160
2161inline int mpreal::check_range (int t, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2162{
2163 return mpfr_check_range(mpfr_ptr(),t,rnd_mode);
2164}
2165
2166inline int mpreal::subnormalize (int t,mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2167{
2168 int r = mpfr_subnormalize(mpfr_ptr(),t,rnd_mode);
2169 MPREAL_MSVC_DEBUGVIEW_CODE;
2170 return r;
2171}
2172
2173inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_emin (void)
2174{
2175 return mpfr_get_emin();
2176}
2177
2178inline int mpreal::set_emin (mp_exp_t exp)
2179{
2180 return mpfr_set_emin(exp);
2181}
2182
2183inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_emax (void)
2184{
2185 return mpfr_get_emax();
2186}
2187
2188inline int mpreal::set_emax (mp_exp_t exp)
2189{
2190 return mpfr_set_emax(exp);
2191}
2192
2193inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_emin_min (void)
2194{
2195 return mpfr_get_emin_min();
2196}
2197
2198inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_emin_max (void)
2199{
2200 return mpfr_get_emin_max();
2201}
2202
2203inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_emax_min (void)
2204{
2205 return mpfr_get_emax_min();
2206}
2207
2208inline mp_exp_t mpreal::get_emax_max (void)
2209{
2210 return mpfr_get_emax_max();
2211}
2212
2214// Mathematical Functions
2216
2217// Unary function template with single 'mpreal' argument
2218#define MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(f) \
2219 mpreal y(0, mpfr_get_prec(x.mpfr_srcptr())); \
2220 mpfr_##f(y.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), r); \
2221 return y;
2222
