2223// Binary function template with 'mpreal' and 'unsigned long' arguments
2224#define MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(f, u) \
2225 mpreal y(0, mpfr_get_prec(x.mpfr_srcptr())); \
2226 mpfr_##f(y.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), u, r); \
2227 return y;
2228
2229inline const mpreal sqr (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2230{ MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sqr ); }
2231
2232inline const mpreal sqrt (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2233{ MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sqrt); }
2234
2235inline const mpreal sqrt(const unsigned long int x, mp_rnd_t r)
2236{
2237 mpreal y;
2238 mpfr_sqrt_ui(y.mpfr_ptr(), x, r);
2239 return y;
2240}
2241
2242inline const mpreal sqrt(const unsigned int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2243{
2244 return sqrt(static_cast<unsigned long int>(v),rnd_mode);
2245}
2246
2247inline const mpreal sqrt(const long int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2248{
2249 if (v>=0) return sqrt(static_cast<unsigned long int>(v),rnd_mode);
2250 else return mpreal().setNan(); // NaN
2251}
2252
2253inline const mpreal sqrt(const int v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2254{
2255 if (v>=0) return sqrt(static_cast<unsigned long int>(v),rnd_mode);
2256 else return mpreal().setNan(); // NaN
2257}
2258
2259inline const mpreal root(const mpreal& x, unsigned long int k, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2260{
2261 mpreal y(0, mpfr_get_prec(x.mpfr_srcptr()));
2262#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(4,0,0))
2263 mpfr_rootn_ui(y.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), k, r);
2264#else
2265 mpfr_root(y.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), k, r);
2266#endif
2267 return y;
2268}
2269
2270inline const mpreal dim(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2271{
2272 mpreal y(0, mpfr_get_prec(a.mpfr_srcptr()));
2273 mpfr_dim(y.mpfr_ptr(), a.mpfr_srcptr(), b.mpfr_srcptr(), r);
2274 return y;
2275}
2276
2277inline int cmpabs(const mpreal& a,const mpreal& b)
2278{
2279 return mpfr_cmpabs(a.mpfr_ptr(), b.mpfr_srcptr());
2280}
2281
2282inline int sin_cos(mpreal& s, mpreal& c, const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2283{
2284 return mpfr_sin_cos(s.mpfr_ptr(), c.mpfr_ptr(), v.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2285}
2286
2287inline const mpreal sqrt (const long double v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode) { return sqrt(mpreal(v),rnd_mode); }
2288inline const mpreal sqrt (const double v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode) { return sqrt(mpreal(v),rnd_mode); }
2289
2290inline const mpreal cbrt (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(cbrt ); }
2291inline const mpreal fabs (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(abs ); }
2292inline const mpreal abs (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(abs ); }
2293inline const mpreal log (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(log ); }
2294inline const mpreal log2 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(log2 ); }
2295inline const mpreal log10 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(log10); }
2296inline const mpreal exp (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(exp ); }
2297inline const mpreal exp2 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(exp2 ); }
2298inline const mpreal exp10 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(exp10); }
2299inline const mpreal cos (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(cos ); }
2300inline const mpreal sin (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sin ); }
2301inline const mpreal tan (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(tan ); }
2302inline const mpreal sec (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sec ); }
2303inline const mpreal csc (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(csc ); }
2304inline const mpreal cot (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(cot ); }
2305inline const mpreal acos (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(acos ); }
2306inline const mpreal asin (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(asin ); }
2307inline const mpreal atan (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(atan ); }
2308
2309inline const mpreal logb (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return log2 (abs(x),r); }
2310inline mp_exp_t ilogb (const mpreal& x) { return x.get_exp(); }
2311
2312inline const mpreal acot (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return atan (1/v, r); }
2313inline const mpreal asec (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return acos (1/v, r); }
2314inline const mpreal acsc (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return asin (1/v, r); }
2315inline const mpreal acoth (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return atanh(1/v, r); }
2316inline const mpreal asech (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return acosh(1/v, r); }
2317inline const mpreal acsch (const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { return asinh(1/v, r); }
2318
2319inline const mpreal cosh (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(cosh ); }
2320inline const mpreal sinh (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sinh ); }
2321inline const mpreal tanh (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(tanh ); }
2322inline const mpreal sech (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sech ); }
2323inline const mpreal csch (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(csch ); }
2324inline const mpreal coth (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(coth ); }
2325inline const mpreal acosh (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(acosh); }
2326inline const mpreal asinh (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(asinh); }
2327inline const mpreal atanh (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(atanh); }
2328
2329inline const mpreal log1p (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(log1p ); }
2330inline const mpreal expm1 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(expm1 ); }
2331inline const mpreal eint (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(eint ); }
2332inline const mpreal gamma (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(gamma ); }
2333inline const mpreal tgamma (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(gamma ); }
2334inline const mpreal lngamma (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(lngamma); }
2335inline const mpreal zeta (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(zeta ); }
2336inline const mpreal erf (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(erf ); }
2337inline const mpreal erfc (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(erfc ); }
2338inline const mpreal besselj0(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(j0 ); }
2339inline const mpreal besselj1(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(j1 ); }
2340inline const mpreal bessely0(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(y0 ); }
2341inline const mpreal bessely1(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(y1 ); }
2342
2343#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(4,0,0))
2344inline const mpreal gammainc (const mpreal& a, const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2345{
2346 /*
2347 The non-normalized (upper) incomplete gamma function of a and x:
2348 gammainc(a,x) := Gamma(a,x) = int(t^(a-1) * exp(-t), t=x..infinity)
2349 */
2350 mpreal y(0,(std::max)(a.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2351 mpfr_gamma_inc(y.mpfr_ptr(), a.mpfr_srcptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2352 return y;
2353}
2354
2355inline const mpreal beta (const mpreal& z, const mpreal& w, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2356{
2357 /*
2358 Beta function, uses formula (6.2.2) from Abramowitz & Stegun:
2359 beta(z,w) = gamma(z)*gamma(w)/gamma(z+w)
2360 */
2361 mpreal y(0,(std::max)(z.getPrecision(), w.getPrecision()));
2362 mpfr_beta(y.mpfr_ptr(), z.mpfr_srcptr(), w.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2363 return y;
2364}
2365
2366inline const mpreal log_ui (unsigned long int n, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2367{
2368 /* Computes natural logarithm of an unsigned long */
2369 mpreal y(0, prec);
2370 mpfr_log_ui(y.mpfr_ptr(),n,rnd_mode);
2371 return y;
2372}
2373#endif
2374
2375#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(4,2,0))
2376
2377/* f(x,u) = f(2*pi*x/u) */
2378inline const mpreal cosu (const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(cosu, u); }
2379inline const mpreal sinu (const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(sinu, u); }
2380inline const mpreal tanu (const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(tanu, u); }
2381inline const mpreal acosu (const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(acosu, u); }
2382inline const mpreal asinu (const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(asinu, u); }
2383inline const mpreal atanu (const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(atanu, u); }
2384
2385/* f(x) = f(pi*x) */
2386inline const mpreal cospi (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(cospi ); }
2387inline const mpreal sinpi (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(sinpi ); }
2388inline const mpreal tanpi (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(tanpi ); }
2389inline const mpreal acospi (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(acospi); }
2390inline const mpreal asinpi (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(asinpi); }
2391inline const mpreal atanpi (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(atanpi); }
2392
2393inline const mpreal log2p1 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(log2p1 ); } /* log2 (1+x) */
2394inline const mpreal log10p1(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(log10p1); } /* log10(1+x) */
2395inline const mpreal exp2m1 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(exp2m1 ); } /* 2^x-1 */
2396inline const mpreal exp10m1(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(exp10m1); } /* 10^x-1 */
2397
2398inline const mpreal atan2u(const mpreal& y, const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2399{
2400 /*
2401 atan2u(y,x,u) = atan(|y/x|)*u/(2*pi) for x > 0
2402 atan2u(y,x,u) = 1-atan(|y/x|)*u/(2*pi) for x < 0
2403 */
2404 mpreal a(0, (std::max)(y.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2405 mpfr_atan2u(a.mpfr_ptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), u, rnd_mode);
2406 return a;
2407}
2408
2409inline const mpreal atan2pi(const mpreal& y, const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2410{
2411 /* atan2pi(x) = atan2u(u=2) */
2412 mpreal a(0, (std::max)(y.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2413 mpfr_atan2pi(a.mpfr_ptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2414 return a;
2415}
2416
2417inline const mpreal powr(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2418{
2419 /* powr(x,y) = exp(y*log(x)) */
2420 mpreal a(0, (std::max)(x.getPrecision(), y.getPrecision()));
2421 mpfr_powr(a.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2422 return a;
2423}
2424
2425inline const mpreal compound(const mpreal& x, long n, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2426{
2427 /* compound(x,n) = (1+x)^n */
2428 mpreal y(0, x.getPrecision());
2429 mpfr_compound_si(y.mpfr_ptr(),x.mpfr_srcptr(),n,rnd_mode);
2430 return y;
2431}
2432
2433inline const mpreal fmod(const mpreal& x, unsigned long u, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2434{
2435 /* x modulo a machine integer u */
2436 MPREAL_BINARY_MATH_FUNCTION_UI_BODY(fmod_ui, u);
2437}
2438#endif
2439
2440inline const mpreal nextpow2(const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2441{
2442 mpreal y(0, x.getPrecision());
2443
2444 if(!iszero(x))
2445 y = ceil(log2(abs(x,r),r));
2446
2447 return y;
2448}
2449
2450inline const mpreal atan2 (const mpreal& y, const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2451{
2452 mpreal a(0,(std::max)(y.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2453 mpfr_atan2(a.mpfr_ptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2454 return a;
2455}
2456
2457inline const mpreal hypot (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2458{
2459 mpreal a(0,(std::max)(y.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2460 mpfr_hypot(a.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2461 return a;
2462}
2463
2464inline const mpreal hypot(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, const mpreal& c)
2465{
2466 if(isnan(a) || isnan(b) || isnan(c)) return mpreal().setNan();
2467 else
2468 {
2469 mpreal absa = abs(a), absb = abs(b), absc = abs(c);
2470 mpreal w = (std::max)(absa, (std::max)(absb, absc));
2471 mpreal r;
2472
2473 if (!iszero(w))
2474 {
2475 mpreal iw = 1/w;
2476 r = w * sqrt(sqr(absa*iw) + sqr(absb*iw) + sqr(absc*iw));
2477 }
2478
2479 return r;
2480 }
2481}
2482
2483inline const mpreal hypot(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, const mpreal& c, const mpreal& d)
2484{
2485 if(isnan(a) || isnan(b) || isnan(c) || isnan(d)) return mpreal().setNan();
2486 else
2487 {
2488 mpreal absa = abs(a), absb = abs(b), absc = abs(c), absd = abs(d);
2489 mpreal w = (std::max)(absa, (std::max)(absb, (std::max)(absc, absd)));
2490 mpreal r;
2491
2492 if (!iszero(w))
2493 {
2494 mpreal iw = 1/w;
2495 r = w * sqrt(sqr(absa*iw) + sqr(absb*iw) + sqr(absc*iw) + sqr(absd*iw));
2496 }
2497
2498 return r;
2499 }
2500}
2501
2502inline const mpreal remainder (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2503{
2504 mpreal a(0,(std::max)(y.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2505 mpfr_remainder(a.mpfr_ptr(), x.mpfr_srcptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2506 return a;
2507}
2508
2509inline const mpreal remquo (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, int* q, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2510{
2511 long lq;
2512 mpreal a(0,(std::max)(y.getPrecision(), x.getPrecision()));
2513 mpfr_remquo(a.mpfr_ptr(), &lq, x.mpfr_srcptr(), y.mpfr_srcptr(), rnd_mode);
2514 if (q) *q = int(lq);
2515 return a;
2516}
2517
2518inline const mpreal fac_ui (unsigned long int v, mp_prec_t prec = mpreal::get_default_prec(),
2519 mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2520{
2521 mpreal x(0, prec);
2522 mpfr_fac_ui(x.mpfr_ptr(),v,rnd_mode);
2523 return x;
2524}
2525
2526
2527inline const mpreal lgamma (const mpreal& v, int *signp = 0, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2528{
2529 mpreal x(v);
2530 int tsignp;
2531
2532 if(signp) mpfr_lgamma(x.mpfr_ptr(), signp,v.mpfr_srcptr(),rnd_mode);
2533 else mpfr_lgamma(x.mpfr_ptr(),&tsignp,v.mpfr_srcptr(),rnd_mode);
2534
2535 return x;
2536}
2537
2538
2539inline const mpreal besseljn (long n, const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2540{
2541 mpreal y(0, x.getPrecision());
2542 mpfr_jn(y.mpfr_ptr(), n, x.mpfr_srcptr(), r);
2543 return y;
2544}
2545
2546inline const mpreal besselyn (long n, const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2547{
2548 mpreal y(0, x.getPrecision());
2549 mpfr_yn(y.mpfr_ptr(), n, x.mpfr_srcptr(), r);
2550 return y;
2551}
2552
2553inline const mpreal fma (const mpreal& v1, const mpreal& v2, const mpreal& v3, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2554{
2555 mpreal a;
2556 mp_prec_t p1, p2, p3;
2557
2558 p1 = v1.get_prec();
2559 p2 = v2.get_prec();
2560 p3 = v3.get_prec();
2561
2562 a.set_prec(p3>p2?(p3>p1?p3:p1):(p2>p1?p2:p1));
2563
2564 mpfr_fma(a.mp,v1.mp,v2.mp,v3.mp,rnd_mode);
2565 return a;
2566}
2567
2568inline const mpreal fms (const mpreal& v1, const mpreal& v2, const mpreal& v3, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2569{
2570 mpreal a;
2571 mp_prec_t p1, p2, p3;
2572
2573 p1 = v1.get_prec();
2574 p2 = v2.get_prec();
2575 p3 = v3.get_prec();
2576
2577 a.set_prec(p3>p2?(p3>p1?p3:p1):(p2>p1?p2:p1));
2578
2579 mpfr_fms(a.mp,v1.mp,v2.mp,v3.mp,rnd_mode);
2580 return a;
2581}
2582
2583inline const mpreal agm (const mpreal& v1, const mpreal& v2, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2584{
2585 mpreal a;
2586 mp_prec_t p1, p2;
2587
2588 p1 = v1.get_prec();
2589 p2 = v2.get_prec();
2590
2591 a.set_prec(p1>p2?p1:p2);
2592
2593 mpfr_agm(a.mp, v1.mp, v2.mp, rnd_mode);
2594
2595 return a;
2596}
2597
2598inline const mpreal sum (const mpreal tab[], const unsigned long int n, int& status, mp_rnd_t mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2599{
2600 mpfr_srcptr *p = new mpfr_srcptr[n];
2601
2602 for (unsigned long int i = 0; i < n; i++)
2603 p[i] = tab[i].mpfr_srcptr();
2604
2605 mpreal x;
2606 status = mpfr_sum(x.mpfr_ptr(), (mpfr_ptr*)p, n, mode);
2607
2608 delete [] p;
2609 return x;
2610}
2611
2613// MPFR 2.4.0 Specifics
2614#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,0))
2615
2616inline int sinh_cosh(mpreal& s, mpreal& c, const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2617{
2618 return mpfr_sinh_cosh(s.mp,c.mp,v.mp,rnd_mode);
2619}
2620
2621inline const mpreal li2 (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2622{
2623 MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(li2);
2624}
2625
2626inline const mpreal rem (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2627{
2628 /* R = rem(X,Y) if Y != 0, returns X - n * Y where n = trunc(X/Y). */
2629 return fmod(x, y, rnd_mode);
2630}
2631
2632inline const mpreal mod (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2633{
2634 (void)rnd_mode;
2635
2636 /*
2637
2638 m = mod(x,y) if y != 0, returns x - n*y where n = floor(x/y)
2639
2640 The following are true by convention:
2641 - mod(x,0) is x
2642 - mod(x,x) is 0
2643 - mod(x,y) for x != y and y != 0 has the same sign as y.
2644
2645 */
2646
2647 if(iszero(y)) return x;
2648 if(x == y) return 0;
2649
2650 mpreal m = x - floor(x / y) * y;
2651
2652 return copysign(abs(m),y); // make sure result has the same sign as Y
2653}
2654
2655inline const mpreal fmod (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2656{
2657 mpreal a;
2658 mp_prec_t yp, xp;
2659
2660 yp = y.get_prec();
2661 xp = x.get_prec();
2662
2663 a.set_prec(yp>xp?yp:xp);
2664
2665 mpfr_fmod(a.mp, x.mp, y.mp, rnd_mode);
2666
2667 return a;
2668}
2669
2670inline const mpreal rec_sqrt(const mpreal& v, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2671{
2672 mpreal x(v);
2673 mpfr_rec_sqrt(x.mp,v.mp,rnd_mode);
2674 return x;
2675}
2676#endif // MPFR 2.4.0 Specifics
2677
2679// MPFR 3.0.0 Specifics
2680#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
2681inline const mpreal digamma (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(digamma); }
2682inline const mpreal ai (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(ai); }
2683#endif // MPFR 3.0.0 Specifics
2684
2686// Constants
2687inline const mpreal const_log2 (mp_prec_t p = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2688{
2689 mpreal x(0, p);
2690 mpfr_const_log2(x.mpfr_ptr(), r);
2691 return x;
2692}

2694inline const mpreal const_pi (mp_prec_t p = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2695{

2697 mpfr_const_pi(x.mpfr_ptr(), r);
2698 return x;

2701inline const mpreal const_euler (mp_prec_t p = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2702{
2703 mpreal x(0, p);
2704 mpfr_const_euler(x.mpfr_ptr(), r);
2705 return x;

2707
2708inline const mpreal const_catalan (mp_prec_t p = mpreal::get_default_prec(), mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2709{

2711 mpfr_const_catalan(x.mpfr_ptr(), r);
2712 return x;

2714
2715inline const mpreal const_infinity (int sign = 1, mp_prec_t p = mpreal::get_default_prec())
2716{
2717 mpreal x(0, p);
2718 mpfr_set_inf(x.mpfr_ptr(), sign);
2719 return x;

2723// Integer Related Functions
2724inline const mpreal ceil(const mpreal& v)
2725{
2726 mpreal x(v);
2727 mpfr_ceil(x.mp,v.mp);
2728 return x;
2729}
2730
2731inline const mpreal floor(const mpreal& v)
2732{
2733 mpreal x(v);
2734 mpfr_floor(x.mp,v.mp);
2735 return x;
2736}
2737
2738inline const mpreal round(const mpreal& v)
2739{
2740 mpreal x(v);
2741 mpfr_round(x.mp,v.mp);
2742 return x;
2743}
2744
2745inline long lround(const mpreal& v)
2746{
2747 long r = std::numeric_limits<long>::min();
2748 mpreal x = round(v);
2749 if (abs(x) < -mpreal(r)) // Assume mpreal(LONG_MIN) is exact
2750 r = x.toLong();
2751 return r;
2752}
2753
2754inline long long llround(const mpreal& v)
2755{
2756 long long r = std::numeric_limits<long long>::min();
2757 mpreal x = round(v);
2758 if (abs(x) < -mpreal(r)) // Assume mpreal(LLONG_MIN) is exact
2759 r = x.toLLong();
2760 return r;
2761}
2762
2763inline const mpreal trunc(const mpreal& v)
2764{
2765 mpreal x(v);
2766 mpfr_trunc(x.mp,v.mp);
2767 return x;
2768}
2769
2770inline const mpreal rint (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(rint ); }
2771inline const mpreal rint_ceil (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(rint_ceil ); }
2772inline const mpreal rint_floor (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(rint_floor); }
2773inline const mpreal rint_round (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(rint_round); }
2774inline const mpreal rint_trunc (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(rint_trunc); }
2775inline const mpreal frac (const mpreal& x, mp_rnd_t r = mpreal::get_default_rnd()) { MPREAL_UNARY_MATH_FUNCTION_BODY(frac ); }
2776
2778// Miscellaneous Functions
2779inline int sgn(const mpreal& op)
2780{
2781 // Please note, this is classic signum function which ignores sign of zero.
2782 // Use signbit if you need sign of zero.
2783 return mpfr_sgn(op.mpfr_srcptr());
2784}
2785
2787// Miscellaneous Functions
2788inline void swap (mpreal& a, mpreal& b) { mpfr_swap(a.mpfr_ptr(),b.mpfr_ptr()); }
2789inline const mpreal (max)(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y){ return (x<y?y:x); }
2790inline const mpreal (min)(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y){ return (y<x?y:x); }
2791
2792inline const mpreal fmax(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2793{
2794 mpreal a;
2795 mpfr_max(a.mp,x.mp,y.mp,rnd_mode);
2796 return a;
2797}
2798
2799inline const mpreal fmin(const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2800{
2801 mpreal a;
2802 mpfr_min(a.mp,x.mp,y.mp,rnd_mode);
2803 return a;
2804}
2805
2806inline const mpreal nexttoward (const mpreal& x, const mpreal& y)
2807{
2808 mpreal a(x);
2809 mpfr_nexttoward(a.mp,y.mp);
2810 return a;
2811}
2812
2813inline const mpreal nextabove (const mpreal& x)
2814{
2815 mpreal a(x);
2816 mpfr_nextabove(a.mp);
2817 return a;
2818}
2819
2820inline const mpreal nextbelow (const mpreal& x)
2821{
2822 mpreal a(x);
2823 mpfr_nextbelow(a.mp);
2824 return a;
2825}
2826
2827inline const mpreal urandomb (gmp_randstate_t& state)
2828{
2829 mpreal x;
2830 mpfr_urandomb(x.mpfr_ptr(),state);
2831 return x;
2832}
2833
2834#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
2835inline const mpreal urandom (gmp_randstate_t& state, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2836{
2837 mpreal x;
2838 mpfr_urandom(x.mpfr_ptr(), state, rnd_mode);
2839 return x;
2840}
2841#endif
2842
2843#if (MPFR_VERSION <= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(2,4,2))
2844inline const mpreal random2 (mp_size_t size, mp_exp_t exp)
2845{
2846 mpreal x;
2847 mpfr_random2(x.mpfr_ptr(),size,exp);
2848 return x;
2849}
2850#endif
2851
2852// Uniformly distributed random number generation
2853// a = random(seed); <- initialization & first random number generation
2854// a = random(); <- next random numbers generation
2855// seed != 0
2856inline const mpreal random(unsigned int seed = 0)
2857{
2858#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,0,0))
2859 static gmp_randstate_t state;
2860 static bool initialize = true;
2861
2862 if(initialize)
2863 {
2864 gmp_randinit_default(state);
2865 gmp_randseed_ui(state,0);
2866 initialize = false;
2867 }
2868
2869 if(seed != 0) gmp_randseed_ui(state,seed);
2870
2871 return mpfr::urandom(state);
2872#else
2873 if(seed != 0) std::srand(seed);
2874 return mpfr::mpreal(std::rand()/(double)RAND_MAX);
2875#endif
2876}
2877
2878#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(3,1,0))
2879inline const mpreal grandom (gmp_randstate_t& state, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2880{
2881 mpreal x;
2882#if (MPFR_VERSION >= MPFR_VERSION_NUM(4,0,0))
2883 mpfr_nrandom(x.mpfr_ptr(), state, rnd_mode);
2884#else
2885 mpfr_grandom(x.mpfr_ptr(), NULL, state, rnd_mode);
2886#endif
2887 return x;
2888}
2889
2890inline const mpreal grandom(unsigned int seed = 0)
2891{
2892 static gmp_randstate_t state;
2893 static bool initialize = true;
2894
2895 if(initialize)
2896 {
2897 gmp_randinit_default(state);
2898 gmp_randseed_ui(state,0);
2899 initialize = false;
2900 }
2901
2902 if(seed != 0) gmp_randseed_ui(state,seed);
2903
2904 return mpfr::grandom(state);
2905}
2906#endif
2907
2909// Set/Get global properties
2910inline void mpreal::set_default_prec(mp_prec_t prec)
2911{
2912 mpfr_set_default_prec(prec);
2913}
2914
2915inline void mpreal::set_default_rnd(mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2916{
2917 mpfr_set_default_rounding_mode(rnd_mode);
2918}
2919
2920inline bool mpreal::fits_in_bits(double x, int n)
2921{
2922 int i;
2923 double t;
2924 return IsInf(x) || (std::modf ( std::ldexp ( std::frexp ( x, &i ), n ), &t ) == 0.0);
2925}
2926
2927inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2928{
2929 mpreal x(a);
2930 mpfr_pow(x.mp,x.mp,b.mp,rnd_mode);
2931 return x;
2932}
2933
2934inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const mpz_t b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2935{
2936 mpreal x(a);
2937 mpfr_pow_z(x.mp,x.mp,b,rnd_mode);
2938 return x;
2939}
2940
2941inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const long long b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2942{
2943 (void)rnd_mode;
2944 return pow(a,mpreal(b));
2945}
2946
2947inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const unsigned long long b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2948{
2949 (void)rnd_mode;
2950 return pow(a,mpreal(b));
2951}
2952
2953inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2954{
2955 mpreal x(a);
2956 mpfr_pow_ui(x.mp,x.mp,b,rnd_mode);
2957 return x;
2958}
2959
2960inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2961{
2962 return pow(a,static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode);
2963}
2964
2965inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2966{
2967 mpreal x(a);
2968 mpfr_pow_si(x.mp,x.mp,b,rnd_mode);
2969 return x;
2970}
2971
2972inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2973{
2974 return pow(a,static_cast<long int>(b),rnd_mode);
2975}
2976
2977inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2978{
2979 return pow(a,mpreal(b),rnd_mode);
2980}
2981
2982inline const mpreal pow(const mpreal& a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2983{
2984 return pow(a,mpreal(b),rnd_mode);
2985}
2986
2987inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode = mpreal::get_default_rnd())
2988{
2989 mpreal x(a);
2990 mpfr_ui_pow(x.mp,a,b.mp,rnd_mode);
2991 return x;
2992}
2993
2994inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
2995{
2996 return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),b,rnd_mode);
2997}
2998
2999inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3000{
3001 if (a>=0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),b,rnd_mode);
3002 else return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode);
3003}
3004
3005inline const mpreal pow(const int a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3006{
3007 if (a>=0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),b,rnd_mode);
3008 else return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode);
3009}
3010
3011inline const mpreal pow(const long double a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3012{
3013 return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode);
3014}
3015
3016inline const mpreal pow(const double a, const mpreal& b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3017{
3018 return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode);
3019}
3020
3021// pow unsigned long int
3022inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3023{
3024 mpreal x(a);
3025 mpfr_ui_pow_ui(x.mp,a,b,rnd_mode);
3026 return x;
3027}
3028
3029inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3030{
3031 return pow(a,static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3032}
3033
3034inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3035{
3036 if(b>0) return pow(a,static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3037 else return pow(a,mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3038}
3039
3040inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3041{
3042 if(b>0) return pow(a,static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3043 else return pow(a,mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3044}
3045
3046inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3047{
3048 return pow(a,mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3049}
3050
3051inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned long int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3052{
3053 return pow(a,mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3054}
3055
3056// pow unsigned int
3057inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3058{
3059 return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),b,rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3060}
3061
3062inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3063{
3064 return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3065}
3066
3067inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3068{
3069 if(b>0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3070 else return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3071}
3072
3073inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3074{
3075 if(b>0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3076 else return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3077}
3078
3079inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3080{
3081 return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3082}
3083
3084inline const mpreal pow(const unsigned int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3085{
3086 return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3087}
3088
3089// pow long int
3090inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3091{
3092 if (a>0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),b,rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3093 else return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode); //mpfr_pow_ui
3094}
3095
3096inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)

3099 else return pow(mpreal(a),static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_pow_ui
3100}
3101
3102inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3103{
3104 if (a>0)
3105 {
3106 if(b>0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3107 else return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3108 }else{
3109 return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode); // mpfr_pow_si
3110 }
3111}
3112
3113inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3114{
3115 if (a>0)
3116 {
3117 if(b>0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),static_cast<unsigned long int>(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow_ui
3118 else return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3119 }else{
3120 return pow(mpreal(a),static_cast<long int>(b),rnd_mode); // mpfr_pow_si
3121 }
3122}
3123
3124inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3125{
3126 if (a>=0) return pow(static_cast<unsigned long int>(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_ui_pow
3127 else return pow(mpreal(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_pow
3128}
3129
3130inline const mpreal pow(const long int a, const double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3131{

3133 else return pow(mpreal(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_pow
3134}
3135
3136// pow int
3137inline const mpreal pow(const int a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3138{

3140 else return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode); //mpfr_pow_ui
3141}
3142
3143inline const mpreal pow(const int a, const unsigned int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3144{

3150{

3152 {

3156 return pow(mpreal(a),b,rnd_mode); // mpfr_pow_si
3157 }
3158}
3159
3160inline const mpreal pow(const int a, const int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3161{

3163 {

3168 }
3169}
3170

3172{

3178{

3180 else return pow(mpreal(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode); //mpfr_pow
3181}
3182
3183// pow long double
3184inline const mpreal pow(const long double a, const long double b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3185{
3186 return pow(mpreal(a),mpreal(b),rnd_mode);
3187}
3188
3189inline const mpreal pow(const long double a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)
3190{

3210{

3214inline const mpreal pow(const double a, const unsigned long int b, mp_rnd_t rnd_mode)

3233} // End of mpfr namespace
3234
3235// Explicit specialization of std::swap for mpreal numbers
3236// Thus standard algorithms will use efficient version of swap (due to Koenig lookup)
3237// Non-throwing swap C++ idiom: http://en.wikibooks.org/wiki/More_C%2B%2B_Idioms/Non-throwing_swap
3238namespace std
3239{
3240
3241 template <>
3242 inline void swap(mpfr::mpreal& x, mpfr::mpreal& y)
3243 {
3244 return mpfr::swap(x, y);
3245 }
3246
3247 template<>
3248 class numeric_limits<mpfr::mpreal>
3249 {
3250 public:
3251 static const bool is_specialized = true;
3252 static const bool is_signed = true;
3253 static const bool is_integer = false;
3254 static const bool is_exact = false;
3255 static const int radix = 2;
3256
3257 static const bool has_infinity = true;
3258 static const bool has_quiet_NaN = true;
3259 static const bool has_signaling_NaN = true;
3260
3261 static const bool is_iec559 = true; // = IEEE 754
3262 static const bool is_bounded = true;
3263 static const bool is_modulo = false;
3264 static const bool traps = true;
3265 static const bool tinyness_before = true;
3266
3267 static const float_denorm_style has_denorm = denorm_absent;
3268
3269 inline static mpfr::mpreal (min) (mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec()) { return mpfr::minval(precision); }
3270 inline static mpfr::mpreal (max) (mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec()) { return mpfr::maxval(precision); }
3271 inline static mpfr::mpreal lowest (mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec()) { return -mpfr::maxval(precision); }
3272
3273 // Returns smallest eps such that 1 + eps != 1 (classic machine epsilon)
3274 inline static mpfr::mpreal epsilon(mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec()) { return mpfr::machine_epsilon(precision); }
3275
3276 // Returns smallest eps such that x + eps != x (relative machine epsilon)
3277 inline static mpfr::mpreal epsilon(const mpfr::mpreal& x) { return mpfr::machine_epsilon(x); }
3278
3279 inline static mpfr::mpreal round_error(mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec())
3280 {
3281 mp_rnd_t r = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_rnd();
3282
3283 if(r == GMP_RNDN) return mpfr::mpreal(0.5, precision);
3284 else return mpfr::mpreal(1.0, precision);
3285 }
3286
3287 inline static const mpfr::mpreal infinity() { return mpfr::const_infinity(); }
3288 inline static const mpfr::mpreal quiet_NaN() { return mpfr::mpreal().setNan(); }
3289 inline static const mpfr::mpreal signaling_NaN() { return mpfr::mpreal().setNan(); }
3290 inline static const mpfr::mpreal denorm_min() { return (min)(); }
3291
3292 // Please note, exponent range is not fixed in MPFR
3293 static const int min_exponent = MPFR_EMIN_DEFAULT;
3294 static const int max_exponent = MPFR_EMAX_DEFAULT;
3295 MPREAL_PERMISSIVE_EXPR static const int min_exponent10 = (int) (MPFR_EMIN_DEFAULT * 0.3010299956639811);
3296 MPREAL_PERMISSIVE_EXPR static const int max_exponent10 = (int) (MPFR_EMAX_DEFAULT * 0.3010299956639811);
3297
3298#ifdef MPREAL_HAVE_DYNAMIC_STD_NUMERIC_LIMITS
3299
3300 // Following members should be constant according to standard, but they can be variable in MPFR
3301 // So we define them as functions here.
3302 //
3303 // This is preferable way for std::numeric_limits<mpfr::mpreal> specialization.
3304 // But it is incompatible with standard std::numeric_limits and might not work with other libraries, e.g. boost.
3305 // See below for compatible implementation.
3306 inline static float_round_style round_style()
3307 {
3308 mp_rnd_t r = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_rnd();
3309
3310 switch (r)
3311 {
3312 case GMP_RNDN: return round_to_nearest;
3313 case GMP_RNDZ: return round_toward_zero;
3314 case GMP_RNDU: return round_toward_infinity;
3315 case GMP_RNDD: return round_toward_neg_infinity;
3316 default: return round_indeterminate;
3317 }
3318 }
3319
3320 inline static int digits() { return int(mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec()); }
3321 inline static int digits(const mpfr::mpreal& x) { return x.getPrecision(); }
3322
3323 inline static int digits10(mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec())
3324 {
3325 return mpfr::bits2digits(precision);
3326 }
3327
3328 inline static int digits10(const mpfr::mpreal& x)
3329 {
3330 return mpfr::bits2digits(x.getPrecision());
3331 }
3332
3333 inline static int max_digits10(mp_prec_t precision = mpfr::mpreal::get_default_prec())
3334 {
3335 return digits10(precision);
3336 }
3337#else
3338 // Digits and round_style are NOT constants when it comes to mpreal.
3339 // If possible, please use functions digits() and round_style() defined above.
3340 //
3341 // These (default) values are preserved for compatibility with existing libraries, e.g. boost.
3342 // Change them accordingly to your application.
3343 //
3344 // For example, if you use 256 bits of precision uniformly in your program, then:
3345 // digits = 256
3346 // digits10 = 77
3347 // max_digits10 = 78
3348 //
3349 // Approximate formula for decimal digits is: digits10 = floor(log10(2) * digits). See bits2digits() for more details.
3350
3351 static const std::float_round_style round_style = round_to_nearest;
3352 static const int digits = 53;
3353 static const int digits10 = 15;
3354 static const int max_digits10 = 16;
3355#endif
3356 };
3357
3358}
3359
3360#endif /* __MPREAL_H__ */

int
